governing_question: Whether the approved Step 05 axes and bounded R5 symbolic structure authorize preparation of a later corner-ownership rule contract for the four explicit gaps, or all four gaps must remain blocked.

blueprint_authority.step: Step 10 - Unknowns And Interpretation Decision Gate

r5_authority.artifact_classification: authoritative for bounded S10R-006-R5-A symbolic coupling rule only

missing_authority: owner for every point inside G_0
owner for every point inside G_1
owner for every point inside G_2
owner for every point inside G_3

route_findings.evidence_basis: R5 identifies four exact symbolic owned arcs and four exact unowned gaps, while Step 05 supplies cardinal-axis evidence and Step 10 permits a separately reviewable interpretation proposal.
route_findings.authority_limit: May authorize preparation only of a later separate rule contract; no owner, allocation, seam, join, closure, evaluation, field, or implementation is authorized here.

route_findings.evidence_basis: R5 explicitly preserves all four gaps as unowned and the historical I10-010 proposal is not current authority.
route_findings.authority_limit: No new rule-design or corner-ownership preparation authority.

candidate_recommendation.reason: Smallest sufficient route that makes a revised corner-ownership proposal visible and rejectable before any gap point is assigned.
